name: numeric-input
description: Framework-agnostic numeric input library with multi-base support, locale-aware formatting, smart validation, value algebra, and comprehensive keyboard handling.

scripts.test: node -e "const {TestRunner} = require('./numeric-input.test.js'); TestRunner.run().then(r => { console.log('\nPassed: ' + r.passed + '/' + r.total + ' tests'); if (r.failed) { r.tests.filter(t => t.status === 'failed').forEach(t => console.error('FAIL: ' + (t.suite ? t.suite + ' > ' : '') + t.name + ': ' + t.error)); process.exit(1); } else { console.log('All tests passed.'); } });"

author: NumericInput.js Contributors
